name: good-strategy-bad-strategy
description: Formulate and audit real strategy using Richard Rumelt''s "Good Strategy Bad Strategy": an honest diagnosis, a guiding policy, and coherent action instead of goals, vision, and wishful thinking. Use when the user mentions "good strategy bad strategy", "strategy kernel", "diagnosis guiding policy coherent action", "our strategy is just goals", "strategic planning", "mission vs strategy", "review my strategy", "annual plan", "our strategy is vague", or "is this actually a strategy". Also trigger w
author: wondelai
